hooks.command: cd "$PWD" && NEW_FILES=$(git log --diff-filter=A --name-only --since='12 hours ago' -- 'apps/aquarium_app/lib/screens/' 'apps/aquarium_app/lib/providers/' 'apps/aquarium_app/lib/models/' 'apps/aquarium_app/lib/services/' 2>/dev/null | grep -E '\.dart$' | sort -u | head -10); if [ -n "$NEW_FILES" ]; then printf '{"systemMessage":"New files added this session in key directories. Consider updating CLAUDE.md:\n%s"}' "$NEW_FILES"; fi
